MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENAS OF MAYOR EDWIN M LEE

REPLY BRIEF RE: ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENAS ISSUED BY MAYOR EDWIN M LEE; DECLARATION OF PETER J KEITH FILED BY PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO EDWIN M. LEE, MAYOR OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; PETITIONER'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENAS OF MAYOR EDWIN M. LEE IS GRANTED IN PART AS TO AT&T. THE ATT SUBPOENAS ARE LIMITED TO DEC. 31-JANUARY 13, 2012 CALLS AND TEXTS MADE TO AND FROM SHERIFF MIRKARIMI, MS. LOPEZ, MS. MADISON, MS. WILLIAMS, MS. HAYNES AND MR. MERTENS HEARING ON MIRKARIMI SUBPOENA IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 7, 2012 AT 9:30 A.M. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENAS OF MAYOR EDWIN M. LEE IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. RESPONDENT SUBMITTED DOCUMENTS TO THE COURT FOR IN CAMERA REVIEW. AFTER REVIEW, THE COURT DETERMINED THAT THEY CONTAIN PRIVILEGED COMMUNICATIONS AND NEED NOT BE DISCLOSED. RESPONDENT IS DIRECTED TO RETRIEVE THE DOCUMENTS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
ORDER GRANTING IN PART CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENA ISSUED BY MAYOR EDWIN M. LEE
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-07-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement Of Subpoenas Of Mayor Edwin M. Lee
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ENFORCEMENT OF SUBPOENAS OF MAYOR EDWIN M. LEE.
Appearances: Peter J. Keith of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3908) for petitioner and moving party; David Waggoner of the Law Office of David P. Waggoner (305.7708) for respondent and opposing party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: granted in part and denied in part. Order signed in court. Respondent submitted documents to the court for in camera review. After review, the court determined that they contain privileged communications and need not be disclosed. Respondent is directed to retrieve the documents. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Petitioner'S Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement Of Subpoenas Of Mayor Edwin M. Lee
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Jun-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PETER KEITH, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3908 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER CCSF;
ATTY. DAVID P. WAGGONER, TEL. NO. 305-7708, APPEARING FOR SHERIFF MIRKARIMI;
ATTY. GERARD J. DONNELLAN, TEL. NO. 778-1358 APPEARING FOR AT&T;
ATTY. PAULA CANNY, TEL. NO. (650) 652-7862 APPEARING FOR MS. LOPEZ.

RULING - A R G U E D; Petitioner'S Order To Show Cause Re: Enforcement Of Subpoenas Of Mayor Edwin M. Lee is Granted in part as to AT&T. The ATT subpoenas are limited to Dec. 31-January 13, 2012 calls and texts made to and from Sheriff Mirkarimi, Ms. Lopez, Ms. Madison, Ms. Williams, Ms. Haynes and Mr. Mertens HEARING ON MIRKARIMI SUBPOENA IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 7, 2012 AT 9:30 A.M. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
